title: Query planner creates unnecessary and expensive automatic index
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id UInt32, name String, age Nullable(UInt32));
INSERT INTO users (name, age) VALUES ('Bob', NULL);
SELECT * FROM users WHERE age IS NULL OR age < 18;
CREATE INDEX idx_users_age ON users (age) TYPE minmax;
key_bug_features: Query planner creates unnecessary automatic index
